report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — DePIN Ecosystem Guide 2026 (650+ projects, $9B market, Filecoin/Render/Helium/Akash coverage) and Crypto Gas Fees & Transaction Costs Guide 2026 (EIP-1559, EIP-4844, L2 savings, multi-chain comparison). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: DePIN sector: 650+ active projects (Mar 2026), ~$9B market cap, up 270% YoY from $5.2B. WEF projects $3.5T by 2028. Categories span compute (Render, Akash, io.net), storage (Filecoin, Arweave, Storj), wireless (Helium 379K+ hotspots), sensors (Hivemapper, WeatherXM). Solana dominates as DePIN chain. Akash now supports NVIDIA B200/H200 GPUs for AI workloads.

Crypto gas fees: EIP-1559 (Aug 2021) introduced base fee + priority tip model. EIP-4844 proto-danksharding slashed L2 fees 90%. Aug 2025 average fees — Ethereum $0.44, Solana $0.00025, Polygon $0.0075, Arbitrum $0.0088. Ethereum fees dropped 95% from early 2024 to late 2025. Account abstraction (EIP-4337/7702) enables gas sponsorship via paymasters.

sections.title: Content Created
items: DePIN Ecosystem Guide 2026 — ~3,200 words, 10 sections covering what DePIN is, flywheel model, categories (compute/storage/wireless/sensors/energy), top protocols comparison table, Solana-DePIN connection, AI GPU boom, evaluation framework, getting started, risks, 6 FAQs. 489 lines of TSX.

Crypto Gas Fees & Transaction Costs Guide 2026 — ~2,800 words, 9 sections covering gas basics, EIP-1559 mechanics, multi-chain comparison, L2 blob revolution, fee comparison table (7 chains), account abstraction, gas saving tips, risks, 6 FAQs. 488 lines of TSX.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: DePIN guide: title 'DePIN Ecosystem Guide 2026: 650+ Projects & $9B TVL | degen0x' (under 60 chars), target keyword 'DePIN ecosystem guide 2026', article + FAQ schemas (6 questions), 5 internal links
Gas fees guide: title 'Crypto Gas Fees & Transaction Costs Guide 2026 | degen0x' (under 60 chars), target keyword 'crypto gas fees guide', article + FAQ schemas (6 questions), 7 internal links
Both pages have OpenGraph + Twitter card metadata, article schema with publishedTime/modifiedTime, FAQ schema for rich snippets, breadcrumb navigation
